Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class WaveRecipe

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.MetadataWithContent
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.WaveRecipe
public class WaveRecipe extends MetadataWithContent

Java class for WaveRecipe complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="WaveRecipe">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}MetadataWithContent">
       <sequence>
         <element name="application" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dataflow" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="format" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="securityPredicate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="targetDatasetAlias" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="templateAssetSourceName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
